vBRIEFInfo.description: Fix project_render.py SKELETON_NARRATIVES to use the lowercase-space 'tech stack' key so task project:render skeletons pass task vbrief:validate.

plan.title: fix(scripts): project_render.py SKELETON_NARRATIVES TechStack key breaks vbrief:validate

narratives.Problem: scripts/project_render.py SKELETON_NARRATIVES uses 'TechStack' (camelCase). scripts/vbrief_validate.py PROJECT_DEF_EXPECTED_NARRATIVES requires 'tech stack' (space-separated) via lowercase comparison. 'TechStack'.lower() == 'techstack' != 'tech stack', so every skeleton created by `task project:render` immediately fails `task vbrief:validate` (part of `task check`).
narratives.Action: Rename 'TechStack' to 'tech stack' in SKELETON_NARRATIVES. Update the corresponding assertion in tests/cli/test_project_render.py (TestSkeletonCreation.test_skeleton_has_empty_narratives) so the end-to-end contract is covered.
narratives.Test: Existing test_project_render.py suite plus the updated assertion; CI's `task check` (which runs vbrief:validate) is the end-to-end gate.
narratives.Outcome: Skeleton PROJECT-DEFINITION.vbrief.json passes `task vbrief:validate` immediately after `task project:render`. `task check` stays green.

items.title: Rename SKELETON_NARRATIVES['TechStack'] to 'tech stack' in scripts/project_render.py
Update TestSkeletonCreation.test_skeleton_has_empty_narratives assertion to check 'tech stack' key
Verify task check (including vbrief:validate) passes end-to-end
